payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Off-white/cream pleated fabric lampshade with visible vertical seams and a conical profile above a partially visible textured cream-colored base; the object is a small tabletop lamp, top and lower base are cut off by the crop, and it appears about 0.6 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"table lamp","short_description":"off-white pleated lampshade edge-crop","long_description":"Off-white/cream pleated fabric lampshade with visible vertical seams and a conical profile above a partially visible textured cream-colored base; the object is a small tabletop lamp, top and lower base are cut off by the crop, and it appears about 0.6 m from the camera.","attributes":["off-white/cream fabric shade","vertical pleats/seams","conical shade shape","textured cream-colored base visible","top and base partially cropped","small tabletop scale"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
